instruction: Add a thin black frame square to the currency rupee icon around the icon (rect x=4, y=4, 120x120, fill none, stroke #222, stroke-width 1).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-rupee.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 8.25H9m6 3H9m3 6-3-3h1.5a3 3 0 1 0 0-6M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-rupee.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 8.25H9m6 3H9m3 6-3-3h1.5a3 3 0 1 0 0-6M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="4" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
